description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the ruby:2.3 Docker image with a cache on the vendor directory. Define the default test stage and add two jobs named pages and test. The pages job runs only on the master branch, executes `apt-get update -yqqq`, `apt-get install -y nodejs`, `bundle install --path vendor`, and `bundle exec middleman build`, then publishes the `public/` folder as a GitLab Pages artifact. The test job runs on all branches except master, runs the same four commands, and does not produce any artifacts. Both jobs share the vendor cache.
